an4.9:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, there are these four ways in which craving arises in a bhikkhu. What four? Craving arises in a bhikkhu because of robes, almsfood, lodgings, or for the sake of life here or elsewhere.These are the four ways in which craving arises in a bhikkhu."
an4.9:1.0.2: With craving as companiona person wanders during this long time.Going from one state to another,he does not overcome saṁsāra.
an4.9:1.0.3: Having known this danger—that craving is the origin of suffering—free from craving, devoid of grasping,a bhikkhu should wander mindfully.
